# signal-quest-rubric

Define what good output looks like for a skill. Given a skill spec and sample outputs, produce a scoring rubric: a ranked list of criteria (C-01, C-02...) each with a pass condition, weight, and category (correctness, depth, format, coverage). The rubric is the objective function for /signal-quest-golden. Start with 3-5 essential criteria; the rubric grows as /signal-quest-golden discovers excellence patterns.


Full runbook available. Use --compact for smaller output compatible with this environment.
